requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Household Refrigerating Appliances (DOE Department Circulars)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——家用制冷器具（DOE部门通告）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——家用製冷器具（DOE部門通告）

summary.en: Household refrigerators and freezers sold in the Philippines must meet Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) set by the Department of Energy (DOE) through Department Circulars under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act (Republic Act No. 11285). MEPS establish a minimum energy-efficiency threshold below which a refrigerator model cannot be legally sold or imported; models are tested for energy consumption following the adopted Philippine National Standard test method (PNS based on the IEC 62552 / ISO household refrigerating appliance test series). DOE administers product testing, registration, and verification, working with BPS on conformity. The MEPS threshold and the energy-consumption calculation are specific to the Philippine framework and the 230 V 60 Hz supply, so a model rated for China conditions must be re-tested and assessed against the Philippine MEPS limit before market entry.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的家用电冰箱和冷冻箱须符合能源部（DOE）依据《能源效率与节约法》（共和国第11285号法）通过部门通告制定的最低能效标准（MEPS）。MEPS设定了一个最低能效门槛，低于该门槛的电冰箱型号不得合法销售或进口；型号须按采用的菲律宾国家标准试验方法（基于IEC 62552/ISO家用制冷器具试验系列的PNS）进行耗电量检测。DOE负责产品检测、登记及核查，并与BPS就合格评定协作。MEPS门槛及耗电量计算为菲律宾框架及230 V 60 Hz供电所特有，故按中国条件额定的型号在进入市场前须重新检测并依据菲律宾MEPS限值评估。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的家用電冰箱和冷凍箱須符合能源部（DOE）依據《能源效率與節約法》（共和國第11285號法）通過部門通告制定的最低能效標準（MEPS）。MEPS設定了一個最低能效門檻，低於該門檻的電冰箱型號不得合法銷售或進口；型號須按採用的菲律賓國家標準試驗方法（基於IEC 62552/ISO家用製冷器具試驗系列的PNS）進行耗電量檢測。DOE負責產品檢測、登記及核查，並與BPS就合格評定協作。MEPS門檻及耗電量計算為菲律賓框架及230 V 60 Hz供電所特有，故按中國條件額定的型號在進入市場前須重新檢測並依據菲律賓MEPS限值評估。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 11285 (Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act) — DOE mandate for MEPS and energy labelling
DOE Department Circulars on Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) and energy efficiency for household refrigerators and freezers
PNS test methods based on the IEC 62552 series (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods) for energy-consumption measurement

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR, with the energy-labelling system administered by NDRC. Products must display the China Energy Label before sale and self-declare a grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The China grade scale and the Philippine MEPS limit use different reference frameworks and supply conditions (China 220 V 50 Hz vs Philippines 230 V 60 Hz), so a Chinese grade does not establish Philippine MEPS compliance.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由NDRC管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识，并依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明能效等级。中国等级体系与菲律宾MEPS限值采用不同的参考框架和供电条件（中国220 V 50 Hz对菲律宾230 V 60 Hz），故中国等级不能确立菲律宾MEPS合规。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由NDRC管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識，並依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明能效等級。中國等級體系與菲律賓MEPS限值採用不同的參考框架和供電條件（中國220 V 50 Hz對菲律賓230 V 60 Hz），故中國等級不能確立菲律賓MEPS合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two main gaps: (1) Different MEPS framework — the Philippine DOE MEPS limit and energy-consumption calculation differ from the China GB 12021.2 grade framework. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee that the model passes the Philippine MEPS threshold without re-testing to the adopted PNS/IEC 62552 method and assessment against the DOE limit. (2) Supply conditions — China testing uses a 220 V 50 Hz basis; the Philippine market operates at 230 V 60 Hz, which affects compressor speed and motor energy consumption, so energy data must be re-measured under Philippine conditions. DOE testing and registration are required before market entry; models that fail the MEPS threshold cannot be imported or sold regardless of their China energy grade.
gap.zh: 两项主要差距：（1）MEPS框架不同——菲律宾DOE的MEPS限值及耗电量计算与中国GB 12021.2等级框架不同。中国1级或2级评定不保证型号在未按采用的PNS/IEC 62552方法重新检测并依据DOE限值评估的情况下通过菲律宾MEPS门槛。（2）供电条件——中国检测以220 V 50 Hz为基准；菲律宾市场运行于230 V 60 Hz，影响压缩机转速和电机耗电量，故能效数据须在菲律宾条件下重新测量。进入市场前须完成DOE检测和登记；未通过MEPS门槛的型号无论其中国能效等级如何均不得进口或销售。
gap.zht: 兩項主要差距：（1）MEPS框架不同——菲律賓DOE的MEPS限值及耗電量計算與中國GB 12021.2等級框架不同。中國1級或2級評定不保證型號在未按採用的PNS/IEC 62552方法重新檢測並依據DOE限值評估的情況下通過菲律賓MEPS門檻。（2）供電條件——中國檢測以220 V 50 Hz為基準；菲律賓市場運行於230 V 60 Hz，影響壓縮機轉速和電機耗電量，故能效數據須在菲律賓條件下重新測量。進入市場前須完成DOE檢測和登記；未通過MEPS門檻的型號無論其中國能效等級如何均不得進口或銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOE MEPS compliance required before a household refrigerator model can be imported or sold in the Philippines, under Republic Act No. 11285 and DOE Department Circulars
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DOE Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) are a mandatory hard gate for household refrigerators entering the Philippine market. China GB 12021.2 energy grades do not substitute for Philippine MEPS compliance — energy data must be re-measured to the adopted PNS/IEC 62552 method under 230 V 60 Hz conditions and assessed against the DOE MEPS limit before importation or sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DOE最低能效标准（MEPS）是家用电冰箱进入菲律宾市场的强制性门槛。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代菲律宾MEPS合规——能效数据须按采用的PNS/IEC 62552方法在230 V 60 Hz条件下重新测量，并依据DOE MEPS限值在进口或销售前评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DOE最低能效標準（MEPS）是家用電冰箱進入菲律賓市場的強制性門檻。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代菲律賓MEPS合規——能效數據須按採用的PNS/IEC 62552方法在230 V 60 Hz條件下重新測量，並依據DOE MEPS限值在進口或銷售前評估。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — DOE Energy Label / Yellow Energy Guide Label (Republic Act No. 11285)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——DOE能效标签/黄色能源指南标签（共和国第11285号法）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——DOE能效標籤/黃色能源指南標籤（共和國第11285號法）

summary.en: Household refrigerators and freezers sold in the Philippines must carry the DOE Energy Label (the yellow Energy Guide / Energy Efficiency Factor label) administered by the Department of Energy under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act (Republic Act No. 11285) and its implementing rules. The label displays the model's energy-efficiency rating, estimated annual energy consumption (kWh/year), and relevant product information based on testing to the adopted PNS/IEC 62552 method. The energy label must be affixed to each unit at point of sale, and the DOE may require product registration and verification before the label can be used. The labelling rating and the displayed consumption figure must reflect testing under Philippine 230 V 60 Hz conditions; the supplier or importer is responsible for ensuring each model is labelled before sale.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的家用电冰箱和冷冻箱须加贴由能源部依据《能源效率与节约法》（共和国第11285号法）及其实施细则管理的DOE能效标签（黄色能源指南/能效因子标签）。该标签展示型号的能效评级、估算年耗电量（千瓦时/年）及基于采用的PNS/IEC 62552方法检测的相关产品信息。能效标签须在销售点加贴于每台产品，且DOE可要求在使用标签前进行产品登记和核查。标识评级及所示耗电量须反映在菲律宾230 V 60 Hz条件下的检测；供应商或进口商负责确保每款型号在销售前完成标识。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的家用電冰箱和冷凍箱須加貼由能源部依據《能源效率與節約法》（共和國第11285號法）及其實施細則管理的DOE能效標籤（黃色能源指南/能效因子標籤）。該標籤展示型號的能效評級、估算年耗電量（千瓦時/年）及基於採用的PNS/IEC 62552方法檢測的相關產品資訊。能效標籤須在銷售點加貼於每台產品，且DOE可要求在使用標籤前進行產品登記和核查。標識評級及所示耗電量須反映在菲律賓230 V 60 Hz條件下的檢測；供應商或進口商負責確保每款型號在銷售前完成標識。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 11285 (Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act) and its Implementing Rules and Regulations — DOE Energy Label mandate
DOE Department Circulars on the Energy Labelling / Energy Guide programme for household refrigerators and freezers
PNS test methods based on the IEC 62552 series — basis for the labelled energy-consumption figures

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (Grade 1 highest, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR; manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The China label is keyed to a 220 V 50 Hz supply and the Chinese grade framework, which is structurally different from the Philippine DOE Energy Label and not cross-comparable without re-testing and recalculation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订版）实施的中国能效标识（CEL）。中国能效标识展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。中国标识以220 V 50 Hz供电及中国等级框架为基准，与菲律宾DOE能效标签在结构上不同，未经重新检测和重新计算不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂版）實施的中國能效標識（CEL）。中國能效標識展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。中國標識以220 V 50 Hz供電及中國等級框架為基準，與菲律賓DOE能效標籤在結構上不同，未經重新檢測和重新計算不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions: (1) DOE Energy Label — each model must carry the Philippine DOE energy label at point of sale; the Chinese CEL cannot be used and must be replaced. The DOE rating and the displayed kWh/year figure must be derived from testing to the adopted PNS/IEC 62552 method under 230 V 60 Hz conditions, so China GB 12021.2 grade data does not transfer. (2) Registration and verification — DOE may require product registration/verification before the label is applied; the supplier or importer is responsible for ensuring labelling and accurate consumption figures. Mislabelling or use of the China energy figure is a market-surveillance risk. Because the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply differs from China 220 V 50 Hz, the consumption figure measured in China cannot simply be copied onto the Philippine label.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求：（1）DOE能效标签——每款型号须在销售点加贴菲律宾DOE能效标签；中国能效标识不能使用，须予以替换。DOE评级及所示千瓦时/年须来自按采用的PNS/IEC 62552方法在230 V 60 Hz条件下的检测，故中国GB 12021.2等级数据不可转移。（2）登记与核查——DOE可要求在加贴标签前进行产品登记/核查；供应商或进口商负责确保标识及耗电量数据准确。错误标识或使用中国能效数据存在市场监管风险。由于菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电与中国220 V 50 Hz不同，在中国测得的耗电量不能直接抄录到菲律宾标签上。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求：（1）DOE能效標籤——每款型號須在銷售點加貼菲律賓DOE能效標籤；中國能效標識不能使用，須予以替換。DOE評級及所示千瓦時/年須來自按採用的PNS/IEC 62552方法在230 V 60 Hz條件下的檢測，故中國GB 12021.2等級數據不可轉移。（2）登記與核查——DOE可要求在加貼標籤前進行產品登記/核查；供應商或進口商負責確保標識及耗電量數據準確。錯誤標識或使用中國能效數據存在市場監管風險。由於菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電與中國220 V 50 Hz不同，在中國測得的耗電量不能直接抄錄到菲律賓標籤上。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOE Energy Label display required before sale of household refrigerators in the Philippines, under Republic Act No. 11285 and DOE Department Circulars
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The DOE Energy Label is mandatory for household refrigerators sold in the Philippines. The Chinese China Energy Label cannot be used — each model must be tested to the adopted PNS/IEC 62552 method under 230 V 60 Hz conditions and labelled with the DOE rating and the kWh/year figure derived from that testing. DOE registration/verification may be required before the label is applied.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DOE能效标签是在菲律宾销售的家用电冰箱的强制要求。中国能效标识不能使用——每款型号须按采用的PNS/IEC 62552方法在230 V 60 Hz条件下检测，并以DOE评级及由该检测得出的千瓦时/年数据加贴标签。在加贴标签前可能须完成DOE登记/核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DOE能效標籤是在菲律賓銷售的家用電冰箱的強制要求。中國能效標識不能使用——每款型號須按採用的PNS/IEC 62552方法在230 V 60 Hz條件下檢測，並以DOE評級及由該檢測得出的千瓦時/年數據加貼標籤。在加貼標籤前可能須完成DOE登記/核查。
